articles.title: Gold recoups losses as oil prices fall on Iran deal
articles.description: Gold prices saw a significant jump on Thursday, recovering from earlier declines. This surge followed a drop in oil prices. The United States and Iran have signed an interim agreement to end their conflict. This development has influenced market movements. Other precious metals also experienced gains. Investors are watching for further economic indicators.

articles.title: Preity Zinta Gets Bombay HC Permission To Sue Google, Meta For Deepfakes
articles.description: Preity Zinta has received permission from the Bombay High Court to file a civil suit against Google, Meta and other entities over alleged AI-generated deepfakes and manipulated content using her identity.

articles.title: Gold falls 1% after Fed holds rates steady, signals rate hike this year
articles.description: Gold prices fell significantly on Wednesday. The U.S. Federal Reserve kept interest rates unchanged but indicated a possible increase later this year. This move strengthened the U.S. dollar, making gold more expensive for international buyers. Markets now anticipate a higher chance of a rate hike in December. Other precious metals like silver, platinum, and palladium also experienced declines.

articles.title: FTC may fine Amazon billions in penalties, over claims that e-commerce giant mislead ...
articles.description: The FTC is reportedly considering legal action against Amazon over allegations of misleading advertisers about its ad business. The probe, focusing on sponsored listings and auction systems, could lead to significant financial penalties, potentially billions of dollars, if violations are found. Several states are also involved, increasing Amazon's financial risks.

articles.title: US stocks: Nasdaq, S&P fall over 1% as Fed holds rates; traders raise hike bets
articles.description: US stocks tumbled Wednesday as traders anticipated a Federal Reserve rate hike, with policymakers projecting rising interest rates later this year. New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh emphasized taming inflation, shifting sentiment from expected rate cuts. This hawkish tilt led to significant market declines across major indices.

articles.description: The deal could provide a further boost to Indian exports to the UK, which rose 12.4 percent year-on-year to $2.4 billion in the first two months of FY27.

articles.title: PM Modi Stresses Importance Of Strait Of Hormuz | 'Global Economy Depends On It' | Modi Trump|News18
articles.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi underscored the strategic importance of the Strait of Hormuz, describing it as a vital artery for the global economy and international trade.Speaking on maritime security and global commerce, PM Modi emphasized that freedom of navigation must be protected and that the safety of seafarers remains a top priority amid rising regional tensions.The Strait of Hormuz is one of the world's most critical shipping routes, carrying a significant share of global energy supplies and commercial trade. Any disruption in the waterway could have far-reaching consequences for international markets, energy security, and supply chains.Modi's remarks come as global leaders continue discussions on regional stability, maritime security, and economic resilience. n18oc_worldNews18 Mobile App - https://onelink.to/desc-youtube

articles.title: The Great Indian Housing Dilemma: Rent, Buy... What Should You Choose?
articles.description: Buying a home in India is no longer the straightforward middle-class milestone it once was. With over half of new properties priced above Rs 1.5 crore, rising interest rates, increasing rents, and hidden ownership costs, the decision between renting and buying has become more complex than ever.This video breaks down the real numbers behind home ownership, compares long-term renting vs buying, and explores whether property is still a strong investment in today’s market.
